original: Increases the effectiveness of your technology-based attacks. It is also useful any time you have to deal with sophisticated machinery.
Increases your strength and endurance. It is especially useful for increasing the damage of any melee strikes you may land on an opponent.
Increases your reaction time. It is a measurement of your piloting aptitude, but also comes in handy when having to avoid a surprise attack or trap.
Increases your accuracy and how well you can aim both hand-held and ship-board ranged weaponry.
Increases your ability to counter sexual urges and addictions, resist psionics, and strengthen your own psionics, should a person of human descent somehow gain mind powers.
